description_long: This bungalow is a single-story, rectangular residential building with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The exterior walls are predominantly white with large, evenly spaced rectangular windows on all sides, allowing for ample natural light. The front facade features a central entrance flanked by multiple windows and two paved platforms connected by a walkway. The interior layout is open, with several partitioned rooms visible through the window and door placements. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with tiled or laminate flooring visible inside. The overall appearance is clean, geometric, and functional, suitable for an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white exterior, and large rectangular windows, featuring a central entrance and open interior layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and two paved platforms connected by a walkway.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the building, side windows, and a glimpse into the interior partitioning.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with large windows and the internal room divisions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the side windows, rear entrance, and the continuation of the paved walkway.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with evenly spaced side and rear windows
